topIssues.title: Failure to create portable copy when path is a top-level drive with no backslash
topIssues.bodyExcerpt:
### Brief summary

Anerror occurs when trying to create a portable copy when path is set to a drive without a backslash

### Steps to reproduce

1. Open the NVDA menu
2. Go to "tools"
3. Go to "create portable copy"
4. Type a drive with no trailing backslash, for example `c:` or `d:`
5. Optionally,

recentComments.author: CyrilleB79
recentComments.excerpt:
Because "c:" is not the root of the C: drive; "c:\" is.

To illustrate this, I have run the following tests in a cmd window:

> C:\Users\username'>cd c:Favorites

topIssues.title: Make duration of indentation beeps configurable
topIssues.bodyExcerpt:
### Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe

In #18898, the length of indentation beeps was reduced from 80ms to 40ms. However, this can cause problems for some users, such as those using audio cues in VS Code.

### Describe the solution you'd like

Completing the work started
